prompt: A hyper-realistic trompe l'oeil image of a spiral-bound sketchbook resting on a wooden surface. On the sketchbook page is a highly detailed graphite pencil drawing of a {argument name="subject description" default="young Asian woman with straight dark hair and bangs"}, looking down thoughtfully as she holds a {argument name="object held" default="Rubik's cube"} in both hands. From the bottom right, a photorealistic human hand holding a wooden pencil enters the frame, appearing to actively draw the sketch. Resting on the top left corner of the textured paper are 1 rectangular white eraser, 1 small blue metal pencil sharpener, and scattered pencil shavings. The transition between the photorealistic hand and the graphite sketch creates a seamless optical illusion.
translatedPrompt: 一张超写实的错视画，画面中是一个放在木质桌面上的螺旋装订速写本。速写本页面上是一幅高度精细的石墨铅笔素描，描绘了一位 {argument name="subject description" default="留着黑色直发和刘海的年轻亚裔女性"}，她正低头沉思，双手拿着一个 {argument name="object held" default="魔方"}。从右下角，一只写实的人手握着木质铅笔进入画面，仿佛正在绘制这幅素描。在纹理纸张的左上角，放着 1 块长方形白色橡皮擦、1 个小型蓝色金属卷笔刀以及散落的铅笔屑。写实的手与石墨素描之间的过渡营造出一种天衣无缝的视觉错觉。

breakdown.creativeCore: 错视画风格速写绘图：生成一张超写实的视觉错觉图，展示一只手正在笔记本上绘制精细的铅笔素描，并配有绘图工具。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
